3.happening: Store every value in a set.
3.why: A set answers 'is x present?' in O(1).

4.happening: Set the best run length to 0.
4.why: We grow it as runs are found.

5.invariant: Each value is checked as a possible start.

6.happening: Is {num} a run start? Only if {num}-1 is absent.
6.why: Walking from a non-start would redo work â€” this is what makes it O(n).
6.invariant: A run is walked only from its smallest value.

7.why: current will climb through the run.
7.invariant: current marks the head of the run.

8.happening: The run has length 1 so far.
8.why: It contains only the start value.
8.invariant: current_length counts values in this run.

9.why: If the next value exists, the run extends.
9.invariant: The run extends while the next value is present.

10.invariant: current is always the run head.

11.happening: The run is now one longer.
11.why: We counted the newly reached value.
11.invariant: current_length equals values walked from the start.

12.happening: Record the best run length so far.
12.why: We keep the longest run seen.
12.invariant: longest is the max over all runs.

13.why: Every start has been walked exactly once.
13.invariant: The answer is the longest run found.

init.happening: Build the set and reset the best length.

loop.happening: Pick the next value or probe the next in a run.

check.happening: Test whether this value starts a run.

update.happening: Walk the run and record the best.
update.why: Measure how far the run reaches.

move.happening: Step the head to the next value.
